zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Clifton於1336年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，她的父親Sir Gervais Clifton18歲，母親Margaret Pierrepont19歲。她於大約1360年與Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Clifton于1336年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，她的父亲Sir Gervais Clifton18岁，母亲Margaret Pierrepont19岁。她于大约1360年与Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1395年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Clifton was born in 1336, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Gervais Clifton, was 18 and her mother, Margaret Pierrepont, was 19. She married Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 about 1360, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1395, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Clifton est née en 1336, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gervais Clifton, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pierrepont, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 environ 1360, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1395, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cliftonが1336年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Gervais Cliftonは18歳，母Margaret Pierrepontは19歳であった。約1360年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでThomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1395年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Clifton(이)가 1336년 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gervais Clifton(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Pierrepont(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Clifton родилась в 1336 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gervais Clifton было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pierrepont, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 около 1360 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1395 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
